subject: An armored bird-warrior banking in flight past a golden pyramid tower, sword visible, with more bird-warriors in the background sky
description: A large raptor-type creature in fitted armor banks sharply in flight, wings fully spread, past the corner of a massive golden stone pyramid tower. The creature carries a sword visible at its side, and wears layered chest armor. The warm amber-gold light bathes the entire scene. Two additional bird-warriors are visible at smaller scale in the upper left background, also airborne. The pyramid towers below are decorated with geometric window apertures and suggest a desert civilization. The composition is an action wide-shot capturing the banking turn against architecture.
foreground: armored aven/raptor creature banking in flight with sword
background: golden pyramid towers, warm teal-green sky, additional bird-warriors
emotion: focused aerial aggression — no readable face
